App.Title: SaveHarbor
App.Subtitle: Windrose world sharing helper
Header.AppTooltip: SaveHarbor helps you back up, import, restore, and later sync Windrose worlds.
Header.StatusTooltip: Latest operation status. This replaces the old bottom status bar.
Header.LatestTooltip: The newest published cloud save version.
Header.GameTooltip: Shows whether Windrose appears to be running. Save operations are blocked while the game is open.
World.Title: World
World.TitleTooltip: The selected local Windrose world SaveHarbor will back up, restore, upload, or replace.
World.OpenFolderTooltip: Open the selected Windrose world save folder.
World.RefreshTooltip: Scan the Windrose save folder again and refresh world/backup status.
World.SelectTooltip: Choose which detected Windrose world this app should manage.
World.Name: Name
World.PresetTooltip: World preset type from the Windrose world description.
World.SizeTooltip: Current size of the selected world folder.
World.FilesTooltip: Number of files inside the selected world folder.
World.WorldIdTooltip: Internal world id used as the save folder name.
Backups.Title: Backups & Safety
Backups.FolderTooltip: Click the path to copy the backup folder location.
Backups.OpenTooltip: Open the folder containing SaveHarbor backup zip files.
Backups.LatestTooltip: Latest backup details. Click filename or path to copy it.
Backups.StoredTooltip: Click the stored backup summary to copy it.
Actions.Title: Actions
Actions.TitleTooltip: Commands for local backup/restore/import and cloud synchronization.
Actions.LocalFilesTooltip: Local save operations. These work without cloud sync.
Actions.BackupTooltip: Create a zip backup of the selected world. Windrose must be closed.
Actions.RestoreTooltip: Replace the selected local world from a SaveHarbor backup. A safety backup is created first.
Actions.ImportTooltip: Import a SaveHarbor backup as a world on this PC. Useful for a friend receiving the world for the first time.
Actions.CloudTooltip: Cloud sync state and actions. Google Drive will be added behind this provider-independent sync layer.
Actions.CheckTooltip: Check the cloud manifest, latest version, and active session state.
Actions.UploadTooltip: Upload the selected local world to the cloud provider. Upload is blocked if cloud changed while you played.
Actions.DownloadTooltip: Download and restore the latest cloud save. A local backup is created before restore.
Actions.StartSessionTooltip: Mark that you are starting to play from the current cloud version, so friends see an active session warning.
Actions.EndSessionTooltip: Clear your active session lock if you stop playing without uploading.
Activity.Title: Activity
